description: Draws an ellipse on a 2D graph from a center point and semi-axes, or from a standard-form equation string. Center takes a point() expression or variable. Rotation uses the rotation() expression.
utility: Draw an ellipse on a 2D graph by center+axes or equation

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 2D graph container to draw on

arguments.name: center
arguments.description: Center of the ellipse as a point() expression or point variable. Defaults to origin if omitted

arguments.name: a
arguments.description: Semi-major axis length (along the rotation direction). Must be positive

arguments.name: b
arguments.description: Semi-minor axis length (perpendicular to rotation). Must be positive

arguments.name: rotation
arguments.description: Rotation angle using rotation() expression - e.g., rotation(pi/4). Defaults to 0 (horizontal)

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Alternative to parametric args - standard form equation string e.g. "x^2/25 + y^2/9 = 1"

alternates.syntax: ellipse(G, point(G, h, k), a, b)
alternates.description: Ellipse at a point with semi-axes a and b
Ellipse centered at origin with semi-axes a and b

alternates.syntax: ellipse(G, point(G, h, k), a, b, rotation(angle))

alternates.description: Ellipse defined by two focus points with default eccentricity

examples.scenario: Ellipse from standard-form equation on a geometry graph
Ellipse defined by two foci points with foci mode and custom sum distance
Ellipse with foci, interpolated point, and focal distance lines for sum property
examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(5,9),size(23.4),range(-5,6),type(geometry))
point_1=point(graph_1,-3,0)
point_2 = point(graph_1, 3, 0, c(olive), fc(goldenrod))
ellipse_1 = ellipse(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(foci), c(coral))
point_3=interpolate(graph_1,ellipse_1,0.1,1.1,fi("earth",size(0.5)))
line_1 = line(graph_1, point_1, point_3, type(segment), c(brown))
line_2 = line(graph_1, point_2, point_3, type(segment), c(coral))

examples.scenario: Ellipse from equation with deferred drawing
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(6,35), size(20), range(-6, 6, 2), type(geometry), t(0.5))
ellipse_1 = ellipse(graph_1, "x^2/4 + y^2/25 = 1", defer())

examples.scenario: Ellipse with computed semi-major property for focal sum display
examples.expression: desc_3 = desc(at(26,32), "d_1 + d_2 = 2a = 2 cdot :{p(ellipse_1, semimajor)}:.2f = :{2 * p(ellipse_1, semimajor)}:.2f")
